mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND r.del_flag = '0' AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE del_flag = '0' AND parent_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_menu SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}
